CONTENT.Career: Moulden began his career with Liverpool and Manchester City; his transfer between the two was investigated by regulators. He spent time on loan at Gloucester City.He then signed for Wolverhampton Wanderers in 2021, spending further loan spells at Ebbsfleet United, Solihull Moors, and Rochdale. He was recalled from his loan at Rochdale in January 2024, and signed on loan for Northampton Town later that month. Moulden said he would challenge for the starting position, a sentiment echoed by Northampton manager Jon Brady.On 22 August 2024, Moulden joined Crystal Palace on a free transfer.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in Bolton, Moulden is the son of former player Paul Moulden.

SUMMARY: Louie Moulden (born 6 January 2002) is an English professional footballer who plays for Crystal Palace, as a goalkeeper.
